doc_title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Treasury Stock Acquisition Under Article 459(1) of the Companies Act)

key_facts.reason_jp: 機動的な資本政策の遂行による株主還元の拡充ならびに資本効率の向上

summary_en: Upper limit ¥4.5B, 4,000,000 shares (6.2% of shares outstanding), open-market purchase on TSE, Jun 1 2026–Mar 31 2027. Reason: flexible capital management and enhanced shareholder returns.
summary_jp: 上限45億円、400万株（発行済株式総数の6.2%）、東京証券取引所における市場買付、2026年6月1日～2027年3月31日。理由：機動的な資本政策と株主還元の拡充。
tag_en: Buyback - 4,000,000 shares (6.2% S/O) - ¥4.5B - open market - Jun 2026–Mar 2027
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 - 400万株（発行済株式総数の6.2%） - 45億円 - 市場買付 - 2026年6月～2027年3月

doc_title_en: Notice of Revision to Dividend Forecast (Increase) for Fiscal Year Ending March 2026

key_facts.reason_jp: 当期通期の連結業績が予想を上回って増益となったこと等を勘案

summary_en: Year-end dividend for FY3/26 increased to 31 yen per share (62 yen pre-split) from prior forecast of 27 yen per share (54 yen pre-split), representing an 8 yen increase on a pre-split basis. Full-year dividend: 112 yen per share (pre-split equivalent) from prior forecast of 104 yen per share. Prior year (FY3/25): 100 yen per share annual.
summary_jp: FY3/26期末配当を31円/株（分割前62円）に修正。従前予想27円（分割前54円）から分割前ベースで8円増。年間配当112円（分割前換算）。前期実績100円。
tag_en: Dividend Hike - FY3/26 Year-end: 31 yen/share (62 yen pre-split) from 27 yen (54 yen pre-split)
tag_jp: 増配 - FY3/26期末配当：31円/株（分割前62円）、従前27円（分割前54円）より
